title: carex canina
intro: Carex canina, also known as Dog's Tail Grass, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Carex canina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Carex canina can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
